overall.description: A ship simulator game depicting a first-person view from a vessel's bridge navigating through stormy seas at night. The player monitors navigation displays while lightning illuminates the dark ocean ahead, with waves occasionally splashing against the bridge windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge with navigation consoles overlooking bow

events.description: distant lightning first becomes visible on the horizon ahead

agents.ego_description: operating the ship from the bridge, monitoring radar and navigation displays while steering through moderate seas

entered.detail: enclosed bridge structure with metal railings and glass windows framing the forward view
leftmost screen showing coastal map with depth contours and navigation markers
center circular screen with rotating radar sweep showing navigation contacts
rightmost screen displaying water depth and bottom profile
forward deck of the vessel with railings and anchor equipment visible through the window
dark stormy sea with visible wave patterns and whitecaps

segments.scene_description: The segment opens from the enclosed bridge of a ship navigating through stormy nighttime seas. Three operational displays dominate the upper view - a chart plotter, rotating radar, and sonar - while the bow cuts through dark waters ahead. Distant lightning begins to flicker on the horizon as the vessel maintains steady forward progress.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge during active lightning storm

events.description: bright lightning strike illuminates the ocean directly ahead of the ship
large wave crashes over the bow and splashes against the bridge window temporarily obscuring view

agents.ego_description: continuing to navigate through deteriorating conditions as lightning intensity increases and waves grow larger

entered.detail: bright electrical discharge striking the water surface ahead of the vessel

segments.scene_description: Lightning activity intensifies as a bright strike hits the water directly ahead, briefly illuminating the entire scene in white light. The sea state worsens with larger waves, culminating in a wave breaking over the bow and splashing against the bridge windows. The navigation displays continue showing radar rotation and depth readings throughout the storm.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge navigating heavy seas with frequent lightning

events.description: multiple lightning strikes occur in quick succession ahead of the vessel
lightning bolt strikes visible to the left side of the ship illuminating the port side

agents.ego_description: maintaining course through heavy weather as lightning strikes surround the vessel on multiple sides

entered.detail: spray and water droplets covering the bridge window from breaking waves

segments.scene_description: The storm reaches peak intensity with waves frequently breaking over the bow and splashing the bridge windows. Lightning strikes occur on multiple bearings - first ahead, then to the port side - creating dramatic illumination of the turbulent seas. The ship maintains steady forward motion through the rough waters as the navigation equipment continues tracking the vessel's progress.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a ship's bridge as a nighttime voyage through stormy seas escalates into a violent tempest. It begins with the vessel cutting through dark waters under the glow of operational chart, radar, and sonar displays, while distant lightning flickers on the horizon. As the storm intensifies, a bright lightning strike hits the water directly ahead, illuminating the scene in white light just as larger waves begin to break over the bow and splash against the bridge windows. The scene then shifts to peak intensity, with frequent waves crashing against the glass and lightning striking across multiple bearings to the port side. The ship maintains its steady forward progress through the turbulent seas, with the navigation equipment continuing to track the vessel's path amidst the dramatic flashes of light.
